Company.title: Company
Company.description: Represents a company profile in a multi-company setup.

parentCompanyId.description: The ID of the parent company, if this is a subsidiary.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's login account in the system.

uid.description: The unique user ID from Firebase Authentication.

username.description: The user's unique username for login.

passwordHash.description: The securely hashed password for the user. Hashing should be done server-side.

employeeId.description: A reference to the corresponding document ID in the 'employees' collection.

role.description: The user's role in the system.

isActive.description: Whether the user's account is active and can log in.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user account was created.

activatedAt.description: The timestamp when the user account was last activated.

createdBy.description: The user ID of the admin who created this account.

Client.title: Client
Client.description: Represents a client of the consultancy.

fileId.description: The client's file ID, in the format 'sequence/year' (e.g., '1/2024').

fileNumber.description: The sequential part of the client's file ID for a given year.

fileYear.description: The year of the client's file ID.

nameAr.description: The full name of the client in Arabic.

nameEn.description: The full name of the client in English.

status.description: The current status of the client's file.

assignedEngineer.description: The ID of the engineer assigned to this client.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the client was created.

ClientTransaction.title: Client Transaction
ClientTransaction.description: Represents an internal service or transaction for a client, like a design submission.

transactionNumber.description: A unique, human-readable, sequential transaction number for the client (e.g., CL123-TX01).

clientId.description: The ID of the client this transaction belongs to.

transactionType.description: The type of transaction, e.g., 'Municipality Design', 'Electricity Design'.

description.description: A brief description of the transaction.

status.description: The current status of the transaction.

assignedEngineerId.description: The ID of the engineer assigned to this transaction.

contract.description: Stores the customized contract clauses and total amount for this specific transaction.

TransactionTimelineEvent.title: Transaction Timeline Event
TransactionTimelineEvent.description: Represents a single event (comment or log) in a transaction's history.

content.description: The content of the comment or the description of the log.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created the event.

userName.description: The name of the user who created the event.

userAvatar.description: URL to the user's avatar image.

Counter.title: Counter
Counter.description: Stores sequential counters for various entities.

counts.description: A map of keys (e.g., years) to their current count.

Employee.title: Employee
Employee.description: Represents an employee in the company.

employeeNumber.description: The unique identifying number for the employee.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Represents a notification for a user about an event in the system.

userId.description: The ID of the user to whom the notification is sent.

title.description: A short, bolded title for the notification.

body.description: The main content of the notification message.

link.description: The URL the user will be redirected to upon clicking the notification.

isRead.description: Whether the user has read the notification.

/companies/{companyId}.description: Stores company profiles for multi-company support.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user login accounts, linked to employees.

/clients/{clientId}.description: Stores information about the company's clients.

/clients/{clientId}/transactions/{transa.description: Stores internal transactions/services for a specific client.
Stores the chronological history and comments for a specific transaction.

/counters/{counterId}.description: Stores shared counters for entities like clients, transactions, etc.

/employees/{employeeId}.description: Stores HR information about company employees.
